---
title: "Tenerife, An Astronomer's Experiment, or, Specialities of a Residence Above the Clouds"
---

## Tenerife, An Astronomer's Experiment, or, Specialities of a Residence Above the Clouds

**Author:** Charles Piazzi Smith
**Date:** 1858
**Imprint:** London: Reeve

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
